column3: (-Bakool Ja Ja the Mighty-)The Dawnservants have charged us with protecting the forest, and protect it we will.

(-Bakool Ja Ja the Mighty-)While it's true that we stopped Sareel Ja, there's no denying the considerable harm he has caused. As head of the guard here, it fell to me to apprise the Dawnservants of the situation, and apologize for letting matters get so out of hand.
(-Bakool Ja Ja the Mighty-)After hearing of everything that happened, all she could say was, “Well, I'm glad you could make new friends.” The nerve!
(-Bakool Ja Ja the Mystic-)Well, she wasn't wrong, Brother.
(-Bakool Ja Ja the Mighty-)Ugh, don't encourage her!
(-Bakool Ja Ja the Mighty-)In any case, if they should ever return to Tural, it will not be said that we neglected our duties.
